text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You sure went all out for training today! And Trainer too—you both
really packed a punch!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I think Trainer wants the same thing I do—to see just how high I
can soar.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure the upcoming Takarazuka Kinen also has something to do
with it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is running in it too, right?! Finally, a head-to-head battle
with your rival! As always, I'll be there to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! Suzuka, let me give you another massage today. We
wouldn't want any sore muscles slowing you down!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Suzuka, your leg muscles are so tight! Like, mega tight! I really need to loosen you up!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No matter how much I run, I feel like I can still go farther...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When I'm running, I feel like there's someone there, pushing me to run
even faster, to go even farther...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because you, our trainer, and everyone else on Team Sirius
has been so supportive.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, and we'll keep being supportive! All you have to do is show us
more of your amazing running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And to show you I mean it, I'll massage your legs till they turn to jelly!
I'll show you what milking cows does for your hand muscles!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: C-cows?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after her jaw-dropping performance at the Kinko Sho, Silence
Suzuka surprises us all by continuing to improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to help her give a spectacular performance at the Takarazuka
Kinen, I head over to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (H-huh? Wh-when did it get so dark?)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (H-huh? Wh-when did it get so dark?)
Heave-ho, heave-ho.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (A-am I being carried? What's going on?!)
Welcome, my dear trainer, to my laboratory.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: L-laboratory?! Who are you?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: L-laboratory?! Who are you?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I am Agnes Tachyon, and I brought you here to have a word with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wry smile adorns the Umamusume's expression. Looking down at her
feet, I see a burlap sack. Did she just kidnap me?!
choice_data_list: What do you want with me, creep?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wry smile adorns the Umamusume's expression. Looking down at her
feet, I see a burlap sack. Did she just kidnap me?!
choice_data_list: What do you want with me, creep?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"Creep" is going a little too far, don't you think? I may have been a
tad rough, but I brought you here with good intent.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You see, I want to talk. Specifically, I want to talk about your trainee,
Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That's all?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That's all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... By the way, have you ever thought about how enigmatic we
Umamusume are?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Our anatomy is practically identical to humans, yet our physical
prowess far exceeds that of man.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume are full of such mysteries... and well, solving those
mysteries is the focus of my research.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...What does that have to do with my trainee?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...What does that have to do with my trainee?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Imagine, running a race accelerating the whole time. Even I have to
admit... your aspirations intrigue me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If she can master that running style of hers, it could take us
Umamusume to the next level—nay, a whole new world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I want to know what training methods you're implementing as you explore this uncharted territory. That is why I brought you here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Interesting. Are you sure you're not doing anything out of the
ordinary?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just plain ol' training and rest. I don't want to overwork her,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If your training is not the cause of such super-Horsegirl speed, then
perhaps Suzuka's innate physical capabilities are just that
spectacular...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just as likely to be something psychological. Perhaps it's
manifesting physically as a perceived increase in strength.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Something psychological? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Surely you've heard it before. We Umamusume are said to run
carrying the hopes and dreams of others.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You've seen the Three Goddesses statue in the plaza, yes? The
legend there also describes Umamusume as beings who carry the wills
of others.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As a researcher, I tend to dismiss such talk as romanticism, but... I am
also an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes when I run, I can feel it. I can feel someone pushing me
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be referring to the fans of racing. One of the many reasons
Umamusume race is to meet the expectations of their adoring fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies... We've drifted from our original conversation.
Unfortunately, hearing about your training regimen has spoiled my
plans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What's more... I have to admit, I have concerns for your future. Grave
concerns.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You and Suzuka seek to boldly go where no racer has gone before.
The ideal you search for may even lie beyond an Umamusume's
capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But when you cross that threshold, her legs...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon trails off and she averts her eyes. I take a deep breath
before continuing with her apparent conclusion.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You don't think her body can handle it.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You don't think her body can handle it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I don't know. Whatever I say would be nothing more than speculation. I'm not even sure Umamusume have limits.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: After all, we are full of mysteries. I apologize if my words alarm you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I am looking forward to seeing what kind of running you
and Suzuka create... May it serve as a shining beacon for generations
to come.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's gooo! I'm off to do some ramp training!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I believe that's next on my schedule too, followed by running the
straightaways, correct?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As always, Silence Suzuka is diligent at practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her regimen is nothing special, and physically, she seems like any
other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet that running of hers is unlike anything I've seen before... Just
what will happen if we continue down this path?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You and Suzuka seek to boldly go where no racer has gone before.
The ideal you search for may even lie beyond an Umamusume's
capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Th-that's right! Ramp training, and then straightaways.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Th-that's right! Ramp training, and then straightaways.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, then I'll get started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her running style is something other Umamusume only dream about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nobody can run like that. Or at least, nobody but Suzuka ever has.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(If we keep this up, she's going to go beyond what should be
physically possible.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(If we keep this up, she's going to go beyond what should be
physically possible.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As much as I don't want to think about it, the thought of an
impending disaster continues to plague my mind.
